data.name: Hentai Tales: Fairy Princess Hypnosis - Tempting Flesh
data.detailed_description:
遊戲玩法

在破解燒腦謎題的同時享受香豔劇情！
按順序連接數字，填滿棋盤上的所有方格
每完成一道謎題，即可解鎖全新色氣圖像與後續劇情篇章！
你能解開所有謎題，與所有女孩相遇嗎？！

故事背景

身為擁有被詛咒體質的崑崙奴，我被迫侍奉耀光仙宗那群傲慢的修仙者。
直到發現禁忌的催眠秘術後，我將那些凌虐者化為慾火焚身的傀儡——點燃殘酷復仇的燎原之火。

角色介紹

葉靈兒：

以折磨你為樂的天才小惡魔，那份稚氣的傲慢正適合成為你初次施展催眠慾望的實驗品

蘇清寒：

對你流露罕見憐憫的溫柔師姐，那份母性溫暖下隱藏著連她自己都未曾察覺、等待被你改寫的宿命

遊戲特色

  • 20張精美少女香豔圖集
  • 擁有獨特個性的女孩們交織而成的奇幻情色物語
  • 可跳過解謎直接體驗劇情（解謎時按下Enter鍵）
  • CG鑑賞模式（解謎完成後點擊CG兩側箭頭切換）

data.name: Hentai Tales: Fairy Princess Hypnosis - Tempting Flesh
data.detailed_description:
GamePlay

Enjoy a sensual story while completing tricky puzzles!
Connect the numbers sequentially, using all of the squares on the board
After completing a puzzle, you will unlock a sexy new image and the next part of the story!
Can you complete every puzzle and meet all of the girls?!

Story Background

As a Kunlun slave with a cursed physique, I am condemned to serve the arrogant cultivators of the Radiant Light Immortal Sect.
But when I discover a forbidden hypnotic art, I seize the power to turn my tormentors into lust-crazed puppets—and ignite a path of ruthless vengeance.

Characters

Ye Ling'er:

A bratty prodigy who delights in tormenting you. Her childish arrogance makes her the perfect first subject for your newfound hypnotic desires.

Su Qinghan:

Kind-hearted and maternal, she shows you rare pity. Yet, her gentle warmth conceals a destined fate she is unaware of, waiting to be rewritten by you.

Features

  • 20 sexy and erotic images of beautiful girls.
  • A fantastical erotic story with girls who have unique personalities.
  • You can skip the puzzles if you just want to enjoy the story. (Press Enter during a puzzle).
  • CG Gallery mode. (Click the left and right buttons next to the CG after completing a puzzle).
